title: cwos-telemetry-v1
description: Per-invocation telemetry record (ADR-018 step 1, WS-172). Explicit field allowlist — no free-form payload capture (privacy hygiene).

tokens_derived.description: Derived token cost. Populated from transcript parsing when accessible (per ADR-018 pre-step-1 spike); otherwise null and the bytes_* fields are the proxy.

tokens_source.description: Which source was used to derive tokens_derived. 'transcript' = parsed from ~/.claude/projects/*/conversations/*.jsonl. 'proxy' = estimated from bytes. 'unavailable' = no derivation attempted this session.

kit_sha.description: Git SHA of HomeBase kit tree at the time the telemetry was emitted. Used for regression attribution.
